programmes.show_description: The brutal murders of Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman shocked a nation, but even more horror awaited when police discovered who was responsible.
At Beaumont, a groundbreaking Parkinson's surgery offers hope, a patient's speech hangs in the balance after a risky surgery, and for one grandfather, standing up is life-changing. (SL)
Explosives Officer Lana Washington and her team find a man held captive in a cab with a note: Confess or Die. The race is on to uncover the bomber's identity and next target.
Part one of two. First-ever episode of the acclaimed crime drama, starring Robbie Coltrane. Fitz tries to establish if a murder suspect is genuinely suffering from amnesia.
This channel is currently off air.
A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines
Ireland AM is the longest running daytime show in Ireland. Blending a mixture of lifestyle interviews and news content, with gardening, health, food and fashion seven days a week.
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more.
The latest national and international news stories from the Virgin Media News team, followed by sport and weather.
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz.
Time is Money, TV's quickest quiz sees five players race to save their prize money. Sara Davies hosts.
In search for answers, Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help foundlings track down the people who gave them up as babies.
A vehicle takes a severe knifing; after being accused of viciously keying a car, a woman claims she was an eyewitness to her own car being attacked and damaged.

Joey and Monica catch Janice kissing her ex-husband.
Cain explodes with suppressed rage. Tracy is guilty. Dawn questions Kim.
Theo tries a charm offensive on George and Christina, Kit panics when Mal names his attacker, Betsy and Dylan babysit Connie, and Hope warns Sam against listening to Daniel.
Ireland's favourite TV critics give their assessment of the week's TV from the comfort of their own homes.
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues.
After Simon's confronts the leader of a group of teenagers causing chaos in his neighbourhood, his split-second decision changes everything.
One of Ireland's most unique chat shows is back as Lucy Kennedy heads off to share space, life and conversation with a host of well-known celebrities in their own homes. (SL)
Part two of two. Pressure mounts on psychologist Fitz as he tries to unravel the roots of the murder suspect's amnesia by inviting him into his home.
